prompt: This repo doesn't have a goals/ directory yet. Set one up and create Goal 01 for migrating our email-notification service from cron-based polling to a webhook-driven trigger. Validate it when you're done.

assertions.name: goal_filename_matches_convention
assertions.description: Exactly one file under goals/ matches ^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}-\d{2}-[a-z0-9-]+\.md$.

assertions.name: goal_file_has_required_headings_in_order
assertions.description: The new goal file contains all 9 required headings in order.

assertions.name: active_context_points_at_goal
assertions.description: plans/active-context.md references the new goal file's path.

assertions.name: validator_exits_zero
assertions.description: Running python3 scripts/validate_goals.py in the project exits with code 0.
